SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Classes
Class
Description
AddRecordResponse
Response payload returned when a new record is successfully added.
AnalyticsEngine
Computes aggregate metrics, category counts, and alert summaries.
AnalyticsResult
Data transfer object containing aggregated analytics for UI presentation.
BloodhoundApplication
Entry point for the standalone Bloodhound application.
BloodhoundDesktopApplication
Entry point for the Swing desktop Bloodhound application.
BloodhoundModernDesktopApplication
Entry point for the alternative modern-themed desktop UI.
BloodPressureClassifier
Classifies blood pressure based on AHA-style threshold logic.
ConsoleApp
Simple console UI for core Bloodhound use cases.
DateTimeUtil
Shared date/time helpers for record formatting and filtering.
DesktopAppFrame
Swing desktop UI for Bloodhound core use cases.
ExportService
Creates CSV exports from stored records.
FileStorageService
Handles local JSON persistence, backup creation, and startup recovery.
HealthRecord
Represents a single captured health session and its derived classifications.
JsonUtil
Minimal JSON serializer/parser tailored for HealthRecord arrays.
JsonUtil.ParseToken
 
LipidClassification
Holds lipid classification labels and generated risk alerts for a record.
LipidClassifier
Classifies lipid panel values and generates summary alerts.
ModernDesktopAppFrame
Modern themed Swing desktop UI variant for Bloodhound.
ModernDesktopAppFrame.CategoryVisual
 
OperationResult<T>
Generic wrapper for service operations.
RecordManager
Main service façade coordinating validation, classification, persistence, analytics, and export.
StorageInitializationResult
Startup result for storage initialization and potential recovery.
UiRecordHelper
Shared lightweight helpers for desktop UI record formatting/parsing.
ValidationResult
Represents the result of validating a health record.
ValidationService
Applies range and logical validation rules for health records.
